market.primary_historical_exchange_route: Betfair Historical Data where competition/market coverage and licensing permit
market.auxiliary_historical_route: football-data.co.uk or official/archived bookmaker snapshots only as independently timestamped auxiliary evidence

xg_events.research_open_route: StatsBomb Open Data where coverage exists
xg_events.formal_entry: competition-specific chronological OOF incremental improvement required

competition_isolation: Every source-derived model artifact and weight is learned and validated separately by competition_id.
